title: syngramma wallichii
intro: Syngramma wallichii, also known as the Ceylon Vairagam or Indian Fanshield Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to India and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Syngramma wallichii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin infections, among others. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
